title: Yuko Awakens!! For Family Reasons You're Now a Demon Girl
overview: Yuko didn't have horns or a tail when she went to bed last night! Now her mom's revealing the deep dark secret their family's been hiding for generations — What's going on!?

title: Just How Sporty Are You?! Everything Is Fluctuating
overview: Well... it's time for Yuko to murderize a magical girl... but not before she gets in some exercise and spends her allowance, of course.

title: Nightmare or Forebear?! The Doorstop of Darkness Descends
overview: Lilith contacts Yuko in her dreams with vital information she must remember. After all, Yuko needs all the help she can get! Say, why is Momo helping her anyways?

title: Sharpen Your Mind!! The Newly Awakened Powers of the Magical Girl
overview: Wait a minute; there's a switch on the bottom of Yuko's ancestor statue. What happens if it's turned on? Later, Yuko needs cash fast cause she owes Momo A LOT of money!

title: A Town Full of Traps?? The Demon on the Brink Awakens a New Ability
overview: Momo finally meets Ryoko. Later, the accident-prone Yuko must carry a FRAGILE and VALUABLE laptop home with her. What could possibly go wrong?

title: Courage to Face the Future!! The Heavy Roller Won't Stop
overview: Yuko will need to go deeper into Momo's subconscious so she can implant the idea that will change everything! Perhaps compassion can triumph where fighting has failed.

title: The Pink Method!! The Wheel of Fate Is a Round Tire!!
overview: A change of fortune can only mean one thing: FOOD! Later, Yuko learns the hard way that she and Momo have vastly different definitions of “training.”

title: The Cursed Fruit!! Beware the Sour Mikan!!
overview: Mikan finally makes her debut, and Yuko's anxiety spikes to even higher levels! Is the magical girl here to murderize Yuko or for another reason?

title: Final Exams!! Today I'm One of Those Brainy Demons!!
overview: Yuko and Momo finally resume their duel. In the end, there can be only one winner — who will receive the higher exam score? Later, Mikan takes Yuko to a zombie horror movie.

title: The Ancestor Evolves!! A Pair of Glasses Reflect Within a Dark Lab
overview: Look out Yuko, Shion's up to something... and she won't rest until she runs her experiments! Then, can Yuko and Momo keep a secret from Ryoko?

title: Diving Into Dreams Once Again!! Break Through the Pink Defense Line
overview: Yuko's worried about Momo and dives into her dreams again to get the magical girl to open up. However, is that a good idea? Who knows what could happen this time.

title: Feelings to Convey!! A New Leap Forward for Demonkind!!
overview: Momo needs to process the shocking revelations that rocked her to the core! Perhaps Yuko can solve the dilemma by offering Momo a deal with a demon girl.

title: Yet Another Showdown! The Magical Girl Has a Brand New Appearance?!
overview: When challenging an archnemesis to a duel, please make sure they do not mistake it as an invitation to hang out. It’s awkward for everyone involved.

title: Urban Exploration! The Troubled Mikan and the Excited Demon
overview: Mikan realizes something — she recognizes the box that seals Shamiko’s dad. That means the factory ruins on the outskirts of town hold clues about Momo’s sister! Maybe.

title: The Dark Witch Returns! With Steam From Hell!
overview: After hearing that Lilith has been sealed for over 2000 years, Shamiko and Momo come up with a plan to let her borrow Shamiko's body and enjoy a day of freedom.

title: A New Species Discovered! The Town Café Is a Demon Lair!
overview: Shamiko visits a café rumored to be frequented by demons in search of clues about Sakura, but somehow ends up getting a part-time job instead!

title: Raid! The Pink Plan to Retake Shamiko!
overview: Shamiko learns that Lico and Shirosawa have a connection to Sakura and decides to continue working part-time at the café. However, Momo is vehemently opposed to it!

title: Vow Under the Setting Sun! The Path Forward for Demonkind
overview: When Shamiko finds herself in trouble, the one who saves her is none other than Sakura Chiyoda! Meanwhile, Momo takes a certain action to save Shamiko from her nightmare.

title: A Short Break!! The Demonic Summer Festival
overview: Shamiko's summer vacation has turned out far more hectic than intended. She tries to reclaim some peace in her life, but the looming stack of homework casts a dark shadow...

title: Sparks Fly?! Light and Dark Go on a Joint Excursion!
overview: Shamiko promises to visit the zoo with Momo and Mikan and tries making boxed lunches for them. She’ll need help to make something tasty, so Shamiko visits a certain address.

title: Pitch-Black Feelings!! Darkness Peach Returns!!
overview: Momo is stuck in her darkness form! Without the ability to control her strength, Momo unintentionally destroys whatever she touches.

title: The Ancestor’s Dojo?! Demonkind’s Ultimate Weapon!
overview: Shamiko can’t use her magic rod right because of a lack of imagination. Special training in Lilith’s sealed space will help her. Maybe.

title: New Semester! The Magical Girl’s New Duty!
overview: A chaotic summer break ends, and a new school semester begins with Mikan transferring into Shamiko's class.

title: A Ritual in Darkness! The Demon’s New Ally!!
overview: Shamiko and Momo enter Mikan's heart to negotiate with Ugallu, the entity responsible for the magical girl’s curse!
